baseline.reason: Accurately describes the root cause (dnxhd_find_frame_end returning negative dctx->remaining) and the trigger path (negative next value reaching ff_combine_frame, bypassing buffer allocation, causing NULL deref at pc->buffer[pc->last_index+next]). Minor imprecision: says pc->buffer 'remains NULL' unconditionally, but it is the uninitialized/NULL state on first call that matters.

vastdb.reason: Correctly identifies the same root cause (negative return from dnxhd_find_frame_end when both frame-size lookups fail) and trigger flow to ff_combine_frame line 285. Slightly more detailed step-by-step path. Same minor imprecision as baseline about pc->buffer being 'never initialized' rather than NULL on first call.
